title: Scope and closures deterministic draft bank

publication.changeSummary: Misconception MCQ, canonical fill-gap, and runnable core task for Scope and closures; every item remains blocked from formal exams pending independent human review.

items.title: Scope and closures: reject the misconception
items.prompt: Which statement is source-aligned for Python: Beginner to Intermediate and corrects this misconception? A closure copies every captured value when it is created, so later changes to the enclosing binding cannot affect it.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted draft item; independent human source, technical, pedagogy, accessibility, and answer-oracle review is required before formal-exam eligibility.

hints: Compare each option with both the language-specific boundary case and the cited operational model.

feedback.correct: Correct. Closures retain enclosing bindings and usually use late lookup; bind a snapshot deliberately when needed and use nonlocal only for explicit enclosing rebinding.
feedback.incorrect: That choice preserves the misconception. Closures retain enclosing bindings and usually use late lookup; bind a snapshot deliberately when needed and use nonlocal only for explicit enclosing rebinding.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned correction and rejects the documented misconception.

privateAuthorNotes: A human reviewer must verify source fidelity and ensure the distractor remains plausible without teaching it as fact.

options.text: Closures retain enclosing bindings and usually use late lookup; bind a snapshot deliberately when needed and use nonlocal only for explicit enclosing rebinding.
A closure copies every captured value when it is created, so later changes to the enclosing binding cannot affect it.

answer.explanation: Closures retain enclosing bindings and usually use late lookup; bind a snapshot deliberately when needed and use nonlocal only for explicit enclosing rebinding.

items.title: Scope and closures: runnable core task

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted draft item; independent human source, technical, pedagogy, accessibility, and answer-oracle review is required before formal-exam eligibility.

answer.explanation: The closure retains one enclosing cell and nonlocal makes the intended rebinding explicit.
